title: Sweet Bao Bites
description: Delicate Japanese-inspired bao filled with sweet treats. A perfect dessert or snack.

ingredients.name: Bao filling (sweet bean paste or red bean paste)

instructions: Unroll the bao dough and cut into small squares.
Place a small spoonful of bao filling in the center of each square.
Fold the dough squares into triangles and press the edges to seal.
Place the bao bites on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops with egg wash and sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown.
Allow the bao bites to cool before serving.
Optional: Drizzle with elderflower extract-infused glaze (1:1 elderflower syrup and powdered sugar mixed).
